description: Externalized data maps used by the API pipeline. Extracted from the monolith to prevent silent drift.

language_names._comment: Master superset (~80 entries). Used by gemini_overrides, vo.py, etc.

country_ethnicity_map._comment: Maps country name (lowercased) to ethnicity description for influencer generation.
country_ethnicity_map.israel: Israeli/Jewish - can be Ashkenazi, Sephardi, or Mizrahi, Mediterranean features
country_ethnicity_map.usa: diverse American - can be Caucasian, African American, Hispanic, or Asian American
country_ethnicity_map.uk: British - diverse, can be White British, British Asian, or British African
country_ethnicity_map.germany: German/Central European - fair to light skin, varied hair colors
country_ethnicity_map.france: French - diverse, can include European French, North African French
country_ethnicity_map.spain: Spanish/Mediterranean - olive skin, dark hair, Southern European features
country_ethnicity_map.italy: Italian/Mediterranean - olive skin, dark hair, Southern European features
country_ethnicity_map.brazil: Brazilian - diverse, can be mixed race, African Brazilian, European Brazilian
country_ethnicity_map.japan: Japanese - East Asian features, typically black hair
country_ethnicity_map.south korea: Korean - East Asian features, K-beauty aesthetic, typically black hair
country_ethnicity_map.china: Chinese - East Asian features, typically black hair
country_ethnicity_map.india: Indian/South Asian - brown skin tones, dark hair, South Asian features
country_ethnicity_map.turkey: Turkish - Mediterranean to Middle Eastern, olive skin, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.russia: Russian/Slavic - fair skin, varied hair colors, Eastern European features
country_ethnicity_map.poland: Polish/Slavic - fair skin, varied hair colors, Eastern European features
country_ethnicity_map.thailand: Thai/Southeast Asian - tan skin, dark hair, Southeast Asian features
country_ethnicity_map.vietnam: Vietnamese - East/Southeast Asian features, typically black hair
country_ethnicity_map.mexico: Mexican - Hispanic/Latino, warm skin tones, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.colombia: Colombian - Hispanic/Latino, diverse skin tones, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.argentina: Argentine - European-influenced Latin, lighter skin, varied features
country_ethnicity_map.uae: Arab/Middle Eastern - olive to brown skin tones, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.saudi arabia: Arab/Middle Eastern - olive to brown skin tones, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.egypt: Egyptian/North African - olive to brown skin, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.morocco: Moroccan/North African - olive skin, dark hair, Berber or Arab features
country_ethnicity_map.portugal: Portuguese - Southern European, olive skin, dark hair
country_ethnicity_map.netherlands: Dutch - Northern European, fair skin, tall, varied hair colors
country_ethnicity_map.sweden: Swedish - Scandinavian, fair skin, often blonde, Nordic features
country_ethnicity_map.norway: Norwegian - Scandinavian, fair skin, Nordic features
country_ethnicity_map.australia: Australian - diverse, can be Caucasian, Aboriginal, Asian Australian
country_ethnicity_map.canada: Canadian - diverse, can be Caucasian, Asian, Indigenous, African Canadian
country_ethnicity_map.nigeria: Nigerian/West African - dark skin tones, diverse ethnic features (Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa)

cultural_mapping._comment: Language-code to ethnicity/country fallback when Country column is not set.

he.ethnicity: Israeli/Jewish - diverse including Ashkenazi, Sephardi, Mizrahi

ar.ethnicity: Arab/Middle Eastern - olive to brown skin tones, dark hair

es.ethnicity: Hispanic/Latino - warm skin tones, dark hair

de.ethnicity: German/Central European - fair to light skin

ko.ethnicity: Korean - East Asian features, K-beauty aesthetic

ru.ethnicity: Russian/Slavic - fair skin, Eastern European features

hi.ethnicity: Indian/South Asian - brown skin tones, dark hair

tr.ethnicity: Turkish - Mediterranean to Middle Eastern, olive skin

pl.ethnicity: Polish/Slavic - fair skin, Eastern European features

th.ethnicity: Thai/Southeast Asian - tan skin, dark hair

brand_replacements._comment: Regex patterns (case-insensitive) for cleaning brand names from UGC motion prompts. Keys are regex, values are plain-text replacements.
brand_replacements.\\bMinnie Mouse\\b: cartoon character with polka dot bow
brand_replacements.\\bSpace Mountain\\b: indoor roller coaster in the dark
brand_replacements.\\bIt's a Small World\\b: colorful boat ride through miniature scenes

talking_replacements._comment: Regex patterns (case-insensitive) for removing talking/phone references from UGC motion prompts.
talking_replacements.\\baddressing the camera\\b: looking at the camera with a surprised expression
talking_replacements.\\baddresses the camera\\b: gazes at the camera with delight

speech_rates_wps._comment: Words-per-second for TTS narration. Used to calculate max_narration_words = target_duration * rate. Source: Pellegrino et al. 2019, TTS industry benchmarks.

style_prompts._comment: Visual style prefix/suffix pairs for scene image generation. Key = style name, value = {prefix, suffix}.

Modern flat 2d.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Modern flat 2D illustration. Clean vector graphics, bold solid colors, minimal shadows, geometric shapes, digital art aesthetic. Every element must look like a flat 2D vector illustration, NOT a photograph.
Modern flat 2d.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST be a flat 2D vector illustration – no photorealism, no 3D rendering, no photographs.

Minimal line art.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Minimal line art illustration. Elegant single-weight continuous lines, monochromatic or very limited color palette (1-3 colors max), clean white or light background, hand-drawn artistic look, simplistic beauty.
Minimal line art.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST be minimal line art – thin elegant lines, mostly white space, very few colors. NOT a photograph.

Futuristic isometric Tech Glow.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Futuristic isometric 3D with tech glow effects. Neon accents on dark background, cyberpunk aesthetic, glowing edges, holographic elements, isometric camera angle.
Futuristic isometric Tech Glow.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST have isometric perspective, dark background, neon glow effects, and futuristic tech aesthetic.

Modern semi flat 2d.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Modern semi-flat 2D illustration. Soft gradients, subtle shadows, contemporary illustration, clean design, vibrant yet harmonious colors.
Modern semi flat 2d.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST be a semi-flat 2D illustration with soft gradients – not photorealistic.

Cinematic photography.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Cinematic photography. Dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, professional color grading, film-like quality, anamorphic lens, high production value.
Cinematic photography.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST look like a still from a high-budget film – dramatic lighting, shallow DoF, cinematic color grading.

Soft 3d clay.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Soft 3D clay render (claymation). Smooth rounded shapes, matte clay materials, pastel colors, Pixar-like aesthetic, charming and friendly, studio lighting.
Soft 3d clay.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST look like a 3D clay/plasticine render – round soft shapes, matte pastel materials.

isometric soft vector.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Isometric soft vector illustration. Clean geometric isometric perspective, pastel colors, minimal shadows, infographic-style, modern digital art.
isometric soft vector.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST be an isometric vector illustration – strict isometric angle, clean shapes, pastels.

Paper Cut.prefix: MANDATORY STYLE: Paper cut art (paper craft). Layered cut paper effect, subtle shadows between layers, colorful craft paper textures, whimsical handmade aesthetic.
Paper Cut.suffix: STYLE REMINDER: This MUST look like paper cut art – visible paper layers with shadows, craft textures.
